---
title: "Recipes"
format: html
---

All-grain beer recipe ingredients.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(htmltools)

make_slug <- function(name) {
  name |>
    str_to_lower() |>
    str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9]+", "-") |>
    str_remove_all("-+$") |>
    str_remove_all("^-+")
}

infer_style <- function(name) {
  n <- str_to_lower(name)
  case_when(
    str_detect(n, "\\bipa\\b|india pale ale|neipa|double ipa|triple ipa|imperial ipa") ~ "IPAs",
    str_detect(n, "pale ale|pale")                                           ~ "Pale Ales",
    str_detect(n, "amber|red|red ale|irish red")                            ~ "Amber & Red Ales",
    str_detect(n, "blonde|golden ale|golden")                           ~ "Blonde & Golden Ales",
    str_detect(n, "brown ale|brown|nut brown|dark mild")                ~ "Brown Ales",
    str_detect(n, "stout")                                              ~ "Stouts",
    str_detect(n, "porter")                                             ~ "Porters",
    str_detect(n, "wheat|hefeweizen|witbier|dunkelweizen|weizen|roggenbier|wit\\b") ~ "Wheat Beers & Hefeweizens",
    str_detect(n, "belgian|saison|dubbel|tripel|patersbier|goud|white")      ~ "Belgian Styles",
    str_detect(n, "\\besb\\b|bitter")                                   ~ "Bitters & ESBs",
    str_detect(n, "scottish|shilling|scotch ale|wee heavy")             ~ "Scottish Ales",
    str_detect(n, "lager|pilsner|bock|oktoberfest|kolsch|schwarzbier|california common|doppelbock") ~ "Lagers, Pilsners & Bocks",
    str_detect(n, "barleywine|old ale|strong ale|wheatwine")            ~ "Strong Ales & Barleywines",
    str_detect(n, "berliner|gose|sour|kettle sour")                    ~ "Sours",
    TRUE                                                                ~ "Other"
  )
}

# Style display order (mirrors 04-recipes-by-style.qmd)
style_order <- c(
  "Amber & Red Ales",
  "Pale Ales",
  "Lagers, Pilsners & Bocks",
  "Blonde & Golden Ales",
  "Brown Ales",
  "Stouts",
  "Porters",
  "Bitters & ESBs",
  "Scottish Ales",
  "Strong Ales & Barleywines",
  "IPAs",
  "Wheat Beers & Hefeweizens",
  "Belgian Styles",
  "Sours",
  "Other"
)

recipes <- read_excel("data-processed/recipes.xlsx") |>
  select(id, recipe_name) |>
  mutate(
    slug  = make_slug(recipe_name),
    style = factor(infer_style(recipe_name), levels = style_order)
  ) |>
  arrange(style, recipe_name)
```



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Individual recipe pages are generated with a post-render script `source("R/render-recipes.R")`.

# Emit markdown sections for each style group
recipes |>
  group_by(style) |>
  group_walk(function(df, key) {
    cat(sprintf("\n## %s\n\n", key$style))
    df |>
      mutate(link = sprintf("- [%s](recipes/%s.html)", recipe_name, slug)) |>
      pull(link) |>
      paste(collapse = "\n") |>
      cat()
    cat("\n")
  })
```
